title: 31C CRM Relationship Record (per-executive)
description: Per-executive view of a relationship with an address-book entity. Lives at crm/contacts/{slug}.md (CEO) or personal/crm/contacts/{slug}.md (exec). Holds cadence, last_touch, interaction log, commitments - NOT biographical facts (those live in the address book at entity_ref).

entity_ref.description: Slug of the address book entity. MUST match an existing crm/address-book/{slug}.md file. Dangling refs surface as 'needs entity link' in the radar.

relationship_type.description: This executive's relationship classification. Drives cadence rules. Canonical: tribe, tribe-leadership, prospect, customer, partner, partner-active, investor-active, investor-passive, shareholder, reseller, government, media, advisor, ecosystem, vendor, inactive.

last_touch.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD of most recent meaningful interaction from THIS executive.

created.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when this relationship record was first created.

cadence.description: OPTIONAL per-executive cadence override in days. 0 = no cadence tracking. Empty string accepted as legacy marker. If absent, stage-aware default applies (Phase 2).

status.description: OPTIONAL. Defaults to 'active'. Dormant contacts are excluded from radar.

source.description: OPTIONAL. How this executive acquired the relationship (free-text).

pipeline_company.description: OPTIONAL. Free-text company name used for pipeline.md cross-reference. Falls back to address_book.employer when absent. Aliases handled by crm/aliases.md.

radar_freeze_until.description: OPTIONAL. ISO date or empty string. /crm next skips this contact until the date passes. Must be edited by CEO to unfreeze.

owner.description: AUTO-INJECTED by sync. Slug of the executive who owns this relationship record. Never set manually.
